summary: Completed testing for Iteration 28 - Restore 1688 Purchase Feature. All 10 backend tests passed (100%), 2 skipped. Frontend restore button working correctly with yellow indicator showing cancelled purchases count.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/fulfillment/pipeline/orders/{order_id}/restore-purchase endpoint correctly restores cancelled 1688 purchases
Endpoint sets alibaba_order_id from cancelled_purchases array (most recent first)
Endpoint sets purchase_status_1688 to 'purchased' and status to 'purchased'
Endpoint returns 400 if order already has active alibaba_order_id
Endpoint returns 400 if no cancelled purchases exist
Endpoint returns 400 for invalid index parameter
GET /api/fulfillment/pipeline/orders/{order_id}/cancelled-purchases returns correct structure with can_restore flag
Frontend Restore 1688 Purchase button (green RotateCcw icon) appears only when order has cancelled_purchases and no alibaba_order_id
Yellow indicator (bg-yellow-50) shows cancelled purchases count
Clicking restore button shows browser confirmation dialog
After restore, order refreshes and shows 1688 order ID again
seed_data_creation: Used existing orders - Order 29477 had 1 cancelled purchase (restored during testing), Order 29483 had 4 cancelled purchases (cancelled and restored during testing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 tested Restore 1688 Purchase feature. Key endpoints: POST /api/fulfillment/pipeline/orders/{order_id}/restore-purchase and GET /api/fulfillment/pipeline/orders/{order_id}/cancelled-purchases. Frontend button has data-testid='restore-1688-purchase-btn' and only appears on orders with cancelled_purchases and no active alibaba_order_id. Orders 29477 and 29483 were used for testing - both now have active alibaba_order_ids restored.

restore_button.visibility: Only when cancelled_purchases exists AND alibaba_order_id is null

confirmation_dialog.message_format:
Restore the 1688 purchase for Order #{order_number}?

This will re-link the 1688 order ID: {alibaba_order_id}
